title: 10 Best Ecommerce Platforms in 2026 (Reviewed, Compared, and Rated)

headers.text: 10 Best Ecommerce Platforms in 2026 (Reviewed, Compared, and Rated)
What makes a great ecommerce platform?
What Is the Best Ecommerce Platform?
Summary: What is the Best Ecommerce Platform in 2026?
Best Ecommerce Platform for Small Business
Best Ecommerce Platform for Large Business
Best Ecommerce Platform for Jewelry Sites

paragraphs: Hey, I caught you looking for some of thebest eCommerce platforms, didn’t I? If you want tools to build an online store, you came to the right place.
But here’s the thing: With so many ecommerce platforms out there,how will  you decidewhich is the best eCommerce platform for you and your budget?
Luckily, in this review we’ll compare all the ecommerce platforms, and score them – so you don’t have to. To get us started,  a short primer on what an eCommerce Platform is.

An ecommerce platform is software for business ownersto build an online store and sell products and servicesonline. Most ecommerce platforms include tools to manage marketing, sales, and business operations.
4 most common features are:
A webshop is an integral part of any online business. Your ecommerce platform is your digital storefront. A place to build your brand and relationships with your customers.

So it’s not just about selling products—  the best ecommerce platforms help you grow revenue and offer a better customer experience. Now let’s take a deeper look at the nine best  ecommerce platforms in 2026.
Shopifyis the most popular ecommerce platform in the world. Launched in 2004, Shopify hosts over 1 million eshops.

Shopify has all the essentialtools built-in, including a drag-and-drop website builder, ready-made ecommerce themes, and templates. You get advanced features for content marketing and performance analytics on top.It takes less than an hour to have your first, functional Shopify ecommerce store online.

Shopify is a great choice for beginners that want to get serious about the online shop at minimal costs, and advanced merchants. You don’t need experience in coding or web design.Standout eCommerce features:
In addition to the subscription, Shopify also has transaction fees. You can findfull pricing here. If you’re interested in trying Shopify, check out the3-day free trial.

Shopifyis one of the most popular ecommerce systems today, and with good reason. Eventhough Shopify isn’t cheapest ecommerce platform, you want to go with quality and you get a lot of bang for your buck.

Shopify makes life easy with active customer support, chat and a user-friendly interface. Getting started is painless with ecommerce tutorials, customizable themes, Shopify drag-and-drop store builder, and pre-set templates.

Shopify is well-suited for beginners and advanced ecommerce store owners. You get full access to your theme code and can add plugins to customize your online store. For example, to instantly add wishlist functionality to your Shopify store.Overall rating: 4.4Shopify is a top ecommerce platform for any size of business.

Wixis a cloud-based web and webshop builder. Wix is used on more than 110 million websites.  In recent years, Wix has earned a reputation as one of theeasiest ecommerce platforms to build your online store.
Create a basic store with the drag-and-drop tools. You can save time and money by using ready-made templates. These options are perfect for beginners, and budget-conscious business owners.

While it lacks some of the advanced features you can find in enterprise ecommerce platforms, Wix is still evolving. It includes a clear dashboard and mobile app to easy store management and sales tracking.

Overall rating: 4.0Wixis best suited ecommerce platform forsmall businessesthat don’t have a web developer. Even if you have no experience in web design, it’s easy to create sites with the drag-and-drop builder.

You can add plugins for advanced ecommerce functions. Despite the add-on capabilities, Wix is a website builder at its core. It’s ease-of-use may not make up for the limited features on the cheaper plans.
For bigger businesses that want to build scalable ecommerce stores, it may be better to choose a different ecommerce platform likeShopifyorBigCommerce.
Sellfyis an eCommerce platform for small businesses. It’s the best ecommerce platform to sell merchandise and digital products, but it works well for all kinds of small stores.
Getting started is quick. Sellfy’s store builder interface is simple. There are only 5 themes but enough design and customization options to create a unique ecommerce site.
You can sell physical and digital products or subscriptions on Sellfy. There are built-in marketing apps, website embedding, and upselling options.
Sellfy has 7 integrations including Zapier, which lets you connect Sellfy to 5000+ apps. And you can accept payments through PayPal and Stripe. Customer service is available 24/7 but only over email.
Standout eCommerce features:
Sellfy has a 14-day free trialand a 30-day money-back guarantee withthe paid plans. You get store design migration in Business and product migration in Premium.
Try Sellfyorread our full Sellfy review
Sellfy is a specialised ecommerce platform for creators selling digital products and merchandise. It also works well for physical products and if you already have a website.
The user interface is very easy to navigate and creating a store is really quick. If you ever need help the help articles cover the whole platform. And the 24/7 chat and email support is great.
Overall rating: 4.0Sellfy is a good option for beginners and small stores.
BigCommerceis one of the biggest ecommerce platforms, with sales above $25 billion across 120 countries.

The BigCommerce eCommerce platform is good for large retail brands, as it has a strong product search engine. Also, the BigCommerce user interface makes it easy to create an ecommerce store, even if you don’t have a web developer.
The tools and templates are all beginner-friendly, but if you have tech skills, you can customize your store by editing the CSS and HTML code.Standout Features
BigCommerce has excellent support, including an active community forum and email support. For the 24-hour live chat support you’ll need a paid plan.

Some of the best ecommerce stores are built withBigCommerce. It is a good choice for beginners, with ease of use on par with Shopify.While it doesn’t have as many templates as Shopify, BigCommerce is better for SEO, as you can edit site elements like URLs and page titles. Also, multi-currency selling is an edge BigCommerce has over other ecommerce providers.Some of the features, like shipping integrations and the abandoned cart feature, become available on higher tiers.
Overall rating: 4.4BigCommerce is the best ecommerce solution for small business and medium enterprises, as long as you have some money to spend.
WithWoocommerceyou can turn any WordPress website into an ecommerce store.

WooCommerce comes with a steeper learning curve than most platforms. Yet, with some patience, it’s possible to create a highly-customized WooCommerce site. You can use the WooCommerce Extensions Store to add advanced features and functions.
WooCommerce is the best choice if you want to use content marketing and SEO to build your business on WordPress or if you want to host your own eCommerce site.
WooCommerceis a good choice if you are familiar with WordPress.

If you are new to WordPress, this road could be tough. It takes time and patience to set up a good WooCommerce business. WooCommerce is one of the best free ecommerce platforms, but you need to add a lot of extensions, too. Also, you have to buy separate hosting and a theme.

WooCommerce is the best choice to run an ecommerce store and affiliate website at the same time. If you’ll go with the affiliate route, check outour full list of affiliate-friendly email providers. The SEO power of WordPress means your ecommerce store can grow with search marketing. But remember, if you want to scale your business, be careful about adding too many extensions.

Shift4Shop(previously 3dcart) is an advanced ecommerce platform, in business since 2001. This platform is used by more than 22,000 businesses. And yet, it doesn’t receive the hype of some competitors.

With built-in SEO tools, Shift4Shop is one of the best ecommerce platforms for experienced marketers. There is no drag-and-drop builder, which may frustrate novice users. To get the most out of this platform, you’ll need some development skills. If you can code, you can customize your themes and templates.
You can join the developer community to get help with website design. Also, Shift4Shop has good shipping services.
What could be improved

Shift4Shopisn’t as beginner-friendly asShopify. However, it has some superb features. The SEO potential is handy if you want to focus on content marketing. Also, no transaction fees and unlimited storage space are nice perks.
Overall, this platform offers good value with all its features. With some new themes, and an easier dashboard, it could be a top choice. For now, it’s best for medium, advanced users and developers.
TheVolusionecommerce platform has been around since 1999, the webshop builder is powering 180,000+ ecommerce stores.
It is easy to create your store. You can use a drag-and-drop builder and in-page editing. There are 11 free themes and plenty of premium themes.

However, Volusion doesn’t have a blogging feature. If you want to blog, you can connect a WordPress blog to your store using a plugin. Another catch is that you must buy a separate SSL certificate for website security, but you can also get a free SSL certificate these days.
On the upside, Volusion has recently added sales of digital products. That’s good news for anyone selling ebooks, music, or software.

Volusionhas a great onboarding sequence with a step-by-step wizard. From the start, you get guidance to build your store. It offers truly helpful learning materials that help you grow your ecommerce business.

With a clean dashboard, it’s easy to navigate. You also have plenty of good features for store management and marketing. The premium themes can be expensive. If you want to focus on blogging, it might not be the best platform for an ecommerce store. But, overall, Volusion is a solid provider for a new ecommerce business.

Magento is an open-source ecommerce platform for small to large, enterprise-level online stores.  Nike, HP, and Jack Daniels are just some of the major brands that use this platform. Check out ourfull Magento Commerce Review
You can build a dynamic store with lots of features, but coding is essential. If you don’t have the skills, you’ll certainly need to hire a magento developer or agency.
With a community of 300,000 developers and 1,000 trusted partners, you have expert support, and can find a creative web agency to help your business grow.

Magento Open Source is a free version. You can download and install this ecommerce software on your own  server or with one of the many Magento Hosting services. This process requires technical knowledge, but it may be the best open source ecommerce platform.
The paid option, known as Magento Commerce, can also be self-hosted or hosted by Adobe in Magento commerce cloud. So, you don’t need to deal with tricky installation, setup or updates.
Compared to other platforms, Magento is a professional solution. It is extendable, feature-rich, and can deliver top performance in search engines.
The global developer community is where Magento shines. You can work with any Magento agency to create a truly unique store. The marketplace has hundreds of useful extensions and theme designs.

On the downside, Magento is a complex piece of ecommerce software. It is not for newcomers to ecommerce or web design. Most likely, you will need to outsource development. Besides that, this platform can become very expensive for large enterprises. Many small stores also use Magento.
PrestaShopis an ecommerce solution written in PHP. This freemium software is used by over 300,000 businesses. It’s available in 75 different languages.

Using PrestaShop seems straightforward. Simply download the software, or your website comes pre-installed and hosted by IONOS. There is a coding environment included. You get daily backups and 24/7 technical support.

Like other top ecommerce platforms, you can create products and sort them in categories. PrestaShop has an advanced inventory management system. The community support includes contributors who help optimize the source code. You can use any of the 250+ agency partners to get help building your store.

PrestaShop is similar to other hosted ecommerce platforms. You don’t have as much technical work to do, and get better support. It comes with a SSL certificate for added security on your online store.

PrestaShopis good for small to medium businesses that need a simple ecommerce store. If you’re on a budget, you might not want a platform with high monthly costs. Then the freemium PrestaShop is worth considering. If you have development skills, and want full control over store design, this could work.But if you don’t have technical abilities, Prestashop is not going to work for you. Of course, you can hire a developer, but that may get expensive.  If you want to build a larger online store, costs for extensions can add up.
Ecwidis an ecommerce platform known for its speed and ease-of-use. G2 Crowd once named it the fastest ecommerce implementation platform in the world.

This software is best if you want to add an ecommerce shop to an existing website. So, it’s a close alternative to WooCommerce. Ecwid is a flexible platform. You can use it to sell products yourself or on Amazon, eBay, Facebook, and Instagram.

Ecwidmakes it easy to turn an existing site into an online store.  It’s a beginner-friendly dive into ecommerce. You don’t have to start from scratch, and it’s relatively cheap.  The free version is too limited, so we advise you to get a paid plan.

It is one of the best multi-channel ecommerce platforms. You can integrate with other ecommerce marketplaces or social media. Doing this allows you to reach a bigger audience. You can sell across several platforms from one dashboard.

If you already have a WordPress or Drupal business, Ecwid is a smart addition. You can quickly build a bigger ecommerce business. Unfortunately, the site may get slow when you scale. So it is a good option for smaller businesses, but not for large enterprises.Overall rating: 4.0
Choosing the right ecommerce platform, there are many factors to consider. For example, you must think about your skill level, budget, and business goals.
It’s easy to opt for the more popular ecommerce platforms. But that could be a mistake. Here is our summary to help you make the right choice.

Starting an online store, you might feel a bit overwhelmed. So many platforms to choose from, so much to learn. Look for one of the easy ecommerce platforms.If you’re starting from scratch and don’t mind spending some money, go forShopify. It has everything you need to build from scratch. Also, the blog and support team are excellent for helping you learn about ecommerce.

SellfyandEcwidare user-friendly tools to turn your existing site into an ecommerce store. You can play around with ecommerce store features with their trials. With Sellfy you can create a standalone ecommerce store, too.
Have you got some coding skills?

If you’re confident in website development, you can look beyond Shopify. You could try an advanced platform to create a more unique website.  If you want to customize your site and grow a massive store, check outMagento.For those on a budget, tryPrestaShop. This open-source option is good for customizing websites for free.
If you have a bigger budget, Shift4Shop is a good choice for a scaling business.
If you have a small business you need  a secure website that is PCI compliant. It also should have uptime guarantees, so you don’t risk losing potential sales.

Shopifyor Volusion are two options that offer the best ecommerce hosting for small businesses. Both of these platforms are easy-to-use, even without prior experience.Volusion has some great free tools, and even offers small business loans.Shopify has automatic shipping, which saves you a lot of time.

Startup owners must think about costs. There are a lot of things to pay for, such as branding, marketing, and paid advertising. When it comes to your actual retail platform, you have to get it right without breaking the bank.

If you want to get started quickly, chooseShopify. It’s not the cheapest, but the support and tools will save you time and money in the long run. If you are concerned about budget, and have more time to design and customize your site based on WordPress, tryWooCommerce.
Anybody with a larger business should look for a platform without high fees. As such, Shopify is not a good choice. You want to scale your revenue without paying more to the platform.

For large businesses with no coding skills, chooseBigCommerce. It has no transaction fees, and good features to support fast growth. If you have a bigger budget and can code or hire a developer, consider Magento.
If you want to succeed with dropshipping, you need ecommerce software that easily integrates with wholesalers. You have to  connect your inventory across platforms, and automate shipping.

For this reason,Shopifyis the clear winner here, as it is perfect for dropshipping almost any product. If you have a little more experience in dropshipping or development, you could also tryBigCommerce.
Jewelry is one of the most popular items for dropshipping. So, you can do well onShopifyorWixif you’re targeting this niche. However, these two aren’t great for SEO.
But if you want to use content marketing to build your jewelry brand, use WooCommerce. With this choice, you can build organic traffic with a WordPress blog.

WooCommerceis the clear winner here, as it is the native plugin for WordPress websites. With just a few clicks, you can use the plugin to turn your existing WordPress site into an ecommerce store.On a related note, have a look at how to pick thebest WordPress email marketing tools.
So, there you have our ecommerce platform comparison guide.
Whether you have a startup or large company, there is always a match for you.
When choosing, consider your budget, goals, and current skills. Then, you can find the best ecommerce solutions provider for your needs.
If you’ve outgrown the email tools in your ecommerce platform, have a look atthe best email marketing tools for ecommerce.

CJ helps B2B SaaS and tech companies establish online authority, build trust with people, and sell more. He's the founder of The Copy Crusade, a content marketing agency for B2B companies. And has a special love for B2B MarTech, digital marketing, and ecommerce platforms.Since 2018, his research-driven strategy has been a trusted weapon for 50+ brands, including IBM, Slack, Springboard, Hotjar, and Single Grain. And he beat giants like Amazon and Discord to rank #1 on top keywords

If you’re confident in website development, you can look beyond Shopify. You could try an advanced platform to create a more unique website.  If you want to customize your site and grow a massive store, check outMagento.For those on a budget, tryPrestaShop. This open-source option is good for customizing websites for free. If you have a bigger budget, Shift4Shop is a good choice for a scaling business. If you have a small business you need  a secure website that is PCI compliant. When it comes to your actual retail platform, you have to get it right without breaking the bank. If you want to get started quickly, chooseShopify.
